conclusion: Direct rowchunk2-vs-fullnative c8 stage deltas are now quantified in a compact artifact. The rowchunk/fullnative split is real at the target stages, not just inferred through c1 proxy summaries.

interpretation.direct_delta: The direct in-memory comparator confirms the proxy result without relying on c1 as an intermediary: fullnative and rowchunk2 differ at layer3 full-attention output, layer4 linear attn_input, and layer7 pre-QKV/context in the same minimal decode0 window.
interpretation.next_target: Use this direct comparator path for future narrow deltas; do not add raw tensor dumps. The fix target remains grouped full-attention numerical/composition vs rowchunk semantics.

method: Imported scripts.qwen35_batch_hidden_bisect, monkeypatched _run_batch_hidden to capture raw HiddenRun arrays, ran two minimal L8 c8 batch paths (fullnative no-rowchunk and rowchunk2) with the same native-batch c1 oracle command shape, and compared only selected decode_step0 arrays in memory. No raw tensors are stored in repo artifacts.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: focused direct rowchunk2-vs-fullnative stage comparator closes the iter431 tooling gap with compact in-memory deltas and no raw tensor dump; no performance claim.
